# Abishag Home Health Services

> Professional home nursing, caregiver support, physiotherapy, and elder wellness solutions in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India.

## About

Abishag Home Health Services (abishaginternationals.com) is a Chennai-based healthcare organization providing 15+ professional home health solutions. Founded on the philosophy of "Abundance of Life," we deliver compassionate, certified nursing and caregiver support directly to patients' homes.

## Services

- **Caregiver Support** — Daily living assistance, companionship, personal hygiene help
- **Skilled Nursing** — Wound care, IV therapy, medication management, post-operative monitoring
- **Physiotherapy at Home** — Rehabilitation, pain management, stroke recovery, mobility training
- **ICU Setup at Home** — Hospital-grade equipment, ventilator support, 24/7 ICU-trained nurses
- **Doctor Home Visits** — Consultations, health assessments, treatment plans
- **Hospice & Palliative Support** — Comfort-focused end-of-life support, pain management
- **Dementia Support** — Memory stimulation, behavioral management, safe environments
- **Geriatric Wellness** — Comprehensive elderly assessments, chronic disease management
- **Lab Sample Collection** — Home-based blood tests, urine analysis, report delivery
- **Pharmacy Delivery** — Prescribed medication delivery, refill reminders
- **Dietician Consultation** — Personalized meal plans, therapeutic nutrition
- **Mental Wellness Counseling** — Individual therapy, family support, grief counseling

## Key Facts

- **Location:** 9/860, Nallathambi Nagar, Natesan 2nd Street, Medavakam, Chennai – 600100, Tamil Nadu, India
- **Phone:** +91 99401 79079
- **WhatsApp:** +91 73973 90266 / +91 73973 90288
- **Website:** https://abishaginternationals.com
- **Availability:** 24/7, including weekends and holidays
- **Coverage:** All major Chennai neighborhoods and Tamil Nadu cities

## Areas Served

Medavakam, Velachery, Tambaram, Sholinganallur, OMR, ECR, Adyar, T. Nagar, Anna Nagar, Porur, Chromepet, Pallikaranai, Perumbakkam, Siruseri, Kelambakkam, and more across Chennai and Tamil Nadu.

## Credentials

- All nurses hold valid RN/GNM qualifications
- Caregivers complete proprietary training programs
- Every professional is background-verified
- 24/7 emergency on-call support
- Coordination with referring physicians and hospitals
